name: Legg Mason, Inc.
description: Legg Mason, Inc. was a prominent global asset management firm headquartered in Baltimore, Maryland. The company provided a wide range of investment management and related services to institutional and individual investors through its various specialized investment affiliates. Legg Mason operated as a publicly traded holding company until it was acquired by Franklin Templeton in 2020. The firm was well-known for its multi-affiliate business model, which allowed its independent investment managers to maintain their distinct investment philosophies while benefiting from the firm's global distribution and operational infrastructure.
